'''Laen Pieweto''' was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] poacher during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He led a group of poachers in the [[Rodian Hunting Grounds|Etyyy]] hunting grounds on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

{{Char-stub}}
